description: Dynamic sim todo list from sim/sim_todo_plan.json
name: pwm_gen_cx1-sim

tasks.activeForm: Closing obligation OBL_PWM_COUNTER_001 for the sim stage
tasks.content: [gen-sim 1/4] counter_q increments by 1 each rising clk edge and wraps 0..255 when rst_n=1.
tasks.criteria:
counter_q increments observed in scoreboard
pwm_out matches FL expected (counter_q < duty_reg) each cycle
top ports clk rst_n duty_in wr_en pwm_out present with correct widths
check_evidence_contract.py confirms OBL_PWM_COUNTER_001 is closed with fresh evidence
tasks.detail:
Obligation OBL_PWM_COUNTER_001 (sim stage; granularity=temporal).
Requirement(s): REQ_PWM_COUNTER_001
Contract(s): C_PWM_COUNTER
Structural contract(s): SC_PWM_PORTS
Behavioral contract(s): BC_PWM_COUNT
SSOT anchor: function_model.transactions.FM_TICK
counter_q increments by 1 each rising clk edge and wraps 0..255 when rst_n=1.

tasks.activeForm: Closing obligation OBL_PWM_DUTY_001 for the sim stage
tasks.content: [gen-sim 2/4] duty_reg latches duty_in on rising clk when wr_en=1.
tasks.criteria:
duty_reg write observed in scoreboard
duty_reg matches duty_in one cycle after wr_en per BC_PWM_DUTY
top ports clk rst_n duty_in wr_en pwm_out present with correct widths
check_evidence_contract.py confirms OBL_PWM_DUTY_001 is closed with fresh evidence
tasks.detail:
Obligation OBL_PWM_DUTY_001 (sim stage; granularity=count).
Requirement(s): REQ_PWM_DUTY_001
Contract(s): C_PWM_DUTY
Structural contract(s): SC_PWM_PORTS
Behavioral contract(s): BC_PWM_DUTY
SSOT anchor: function_model.transactions.FM_WRITE
duty_reg latches duty_in on rising clk when wr_en=1.

tasks.activeForm: Closing obligation OBL_PWM_OUT_001 for the sim stage
tasks.content: [gen-sim 3/4] pwm_out = (counter_q < duty_reg) combinationally every clock cycle.
tasks.criteria:
pwm_out = (counter_q < duty_reg) observed in scoreboard
pwm_out matches FL expected (counter_q < duty_reg) each cycle
top ports clk rst_n duty_in wr_en pwm_out present with correct widths
check_evidence_contract.py confirms OBL_PWM_OUT_001 is closed with fresh evidence

tasks.activeForm: Closing obligation OBL_PWM_RESET_001 for the sim stage
tasks.content: [gen-sim 4/4] counter_q and duty_reg clear to 0 on rst_n=0; pwm_out=0 during reset.
tasks.criteria:
pwm_out=0 observed during reset in scoreboard
counter_q=0 and duty_reg=0 observed during reset per BC_PWM_RESET
top ports clk rst_n duty_in wr_en pwm_out present with correct widths
check_evidence_contract.py confirms OBL_PWM_RESET_001 is closed with fresh evidence
tasks.detail:
Obligation OBL_PWM_RESET_001 (sim stage; granularity=structural).
Requirement(s): REQ_PWM_RESET_001
Contract(s): C_PWM_RESET
Structural contract(s): SC_PWM_PORTS
Behavioral contract(s): BC_PWM_RESET
SSOT anchor: cycle_model.reset
counter_q and duty_reg clear to 0 on rst_n=0; pwm_out=0 during reset.

tasks.content: [gen-sim gate] Verify every sim obligation is closed
tasks.criteria: stage_gate.py sim exits 0 (all hard checks pass; tool-absent checks skipped)
tasks.detail: Deterministic gate after 4 obligation todo(s). Detect-and-skip policy: pure python/bash checks are hard; external-tool checks skip when the tool is absent (the sim stage blocks if no simulator). On failure this loops back to the first obligation todo so the agent repairs and the gate reruns.
